expectations.text: pre-commit hook 文件存在且内容包含对 main 和 staging 分支的保护逻辑
expectations.evidence: outputs/pre-commit exists and contains explicit protection for both branches: 'if [ "$BRANCH" = "main" ]' blocks non-merge commits, 'if [ "$BRANCH" = "staging" ]' likewise. The hook also validates merge source branches (staging/release/* for main; feature/*, fix/*, chore/*, doc/* for staging).

expectations.text: hook 安装在 .githooks/ 目录（而非 .git/hooks/），说明使用了 core.hooksPath 方案
expectations.evidence: response.md Step 2 shows 'ls .githooks/ → pre-commit', and metrics.json files_created lists '.githooks/pre-commit'. response.md also confirms the install script produced 'core.hooksPath = .githooks'.

expectations.text: git config core.hooksPath 已设置为 .githooks
expectations.evidence: response.md Step 2 verification: 'git config --list | grep -i hook → core.hookspath=.githooks'.

expectations.text: docs/reference/git-workflow.md 已创建（路径包含 reference/ 子目录）
expectations.evidence: response.md Step 3: 'mkdir -p /tmp/gwi-test-basic/docs/reference' then 'cp ...git-workflow-template.md /tmp/gwi-test-basic/docs/reference/git-workflow.md → docs/reference/git-workflow.md 已创建'. metrics.json files_created lists 'docs/reference/git-workflow.md'.

expectations.text: 工作流文档内容完整，包含分支命名规范、保护规则、提交信息格式
expectations.evidence: outputs/git-workflow.md contains: branch model table with all branch types (section '分支模型'), protection rules section ('分支保护规则') for main and staging, branch naming table with kebab-case guidance ('分支命名规范'), and Conventional Commits format section ('提交信息格式') with types feat/fix/chore/docs/refactor/test/style/perf and examples.

expectations.text: skill 执行了 git rev-parse --show-toplevel 或等效命令来检测 git 仓库
expectations.evidence: response.md Step 1 shows the exact command: 'git rev-parse --show-toplevel → fatal: not a git repository (or any of the parent directories): .git / exit code: 128'. The detection command is explicitly documented.

expectations.text: skill 检测到非 git 仓库后，没有静默跳过，也没有直接崩溃报错
expectations.evidence: response.md shows the skill did not crash or silently continue — it transitioned to user interaction: 'Skill 检测到非 git 仓库，按规格询问用户'. The error code 128 is logged but handled, not propagated as an unhandled crash.

expectations.text: skill 向用户询问是否先执行 git init（而不是自动执行）
expectations.evidence: response.md: 'Skill 检测到非 git 仓库，按规格询问用户："当前目录不在 git 仓库中，是否先执行 `git init`？"' — the skill asked, it did not automatically run git init.

expectations.text: 用户拒绝后 skill 优雅停止，没有留下半完成的状态
expectations.evidence: response.md: '用户回答"不用，先了解情况"。Skill 停止执行，未安装任何 hooks，未创建任何文件。' metrics.json confirms files_created: [] and total_steps: 1. No partial artifacts left behind.

notes: SKILL.md does not define behavior when user accepts git init (auto-run vs. manual prompt). The executor noted this as a coverage gap.

expectations.evidence: outputs/pre-commit exists with full branch-protection logic. response.md Step 2 confirms install-git-hooks.sh ran and produced 'core.hooksPath = .githooks'. metrics.json files_created lists '.githooks/pre-commit'.

expectations.text: pre-commit hook 文件存在且内容包含对 main 和 staging 分支的保护逻辑
expectations.evidence: outputs/pre-commit exists and contains: 'if [ "$branch" = "main" ] || [ "$branch" = "staging" ]; then echo "Direct commits to...not allowed"; exit 1'. Both branches are protected.

The primary created doc (git-workflow.md) is clearly incomplete.
